name: SCAMPER
description: 7 questions: Substitute, Combine, Adapt, Modify, Reuse, Eliminate, Reverse

name: What If
description: Explore possibilities without limits

name: First Principles
description: Remove all assumptions and start from zero

name: Cross-Pollination
description: Draw inspiration from other domains or industries

name: Focus Group
description: Simulate 4-5 types of users reacting

name: Jobs to Be Done
description: When [situation], I want [action], to [outcome]

name: Customer Support
description: Simulate angry user + support
when_to_use: Test the robustness of the UX

name: Six Thinking Hats
description: 6 perspectives: Facts, Emotions, Risks, Benefits, Creativity, Process

name: Debate Club
description: 2 opposing positions, a moderator decides

name: Socratic Questioning
description: Questions that reveal blind spots

name: Shark Tank
description: Pitch the idea, agents stress-test it
when_to_use: Validate the solidity of an idea

name: Pre-mortem
description: It failed in 6 months, why?

name: Five Whys
description: Ask why 5 times to find the root cause

name: Chaos Monkey
description: Deliberately break to test resilience
when_to_use: Verify the robustness of the system

name: Blue Sky
description: Ideal vision without constraints, then come back down

name: Competitor Teardown
description: Analyze the competition to find the gaps

name: User Wishlist
description: 3 magic wishes from users

name: Tech Radar
description: Emerging technologies = new possibilities

name: Concept Blending
description: Merge 2 existing ideas to create something new

name: Dream Mockup
description: Draw the dream version BEFORE thinking about the code
when_to_use: Free the vision without technical constraint
